ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
TENTATIVE RULING: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.
EXAMINER: AERO FETH

Off Calendar Feb-18-2026 Continued To Jun-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate. No appearances were made by any party or counsel.

The Court ordered that an Order to Show Cause re Sanctions shall issue to attorney John E. Fasesky for failure to appear. The matter was continued to June 3, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-02-2025 Continued To Feb-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
John Fasesky, for Robert Zazula, Administrator/Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel reports as to the status of the estate and requests a continuance of sixty days to finalize and file a Petition for Final Distribution.

The subject matter is continued to Feb-18-2026 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 204 as confirmed in open court.

Judge: Hon. Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Ramirez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Continued To Dec-02-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: John Fasesky appeared via zoom for Robert Zazula (administrator).

Mr. Fasesky requested a 60-day continuance to provide receipts. The matter is continued to December 2, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozada. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-06-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Administration Of The Decedent'S Surviving Spouse'S Interest [Probate Code 13502.5], For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration And To Continue Administration Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-05-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Fasesky for Robert Zazula, Administrator (via Zoom).

The court inquired about the legal basis for the petition under Probate Code Section 13502.5. Mr. Fasesky explained that the purpose of the petition was to ensure that the surviving spouse's interest is subject to probate administration and that he cannot file a separate spousal property petition or assert a claim outside this probate case. The decedent's parents filed a creditor's claim for medical expenses and necessities they covered. The surviving spouse, Ryan Porter Craig, abandoned the decedent and moved to Florida and has not participated in the case or shown any interest in the estate.

The petition was taken under submission for further consideration. The court re-set a hearing as to status on close of estate for August 6, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
